source_note: JP→zh/en 機械翻訳 (Claude opus, D-136)。figure 問は図を参照し OCR 混入を除去した stem_jp_clean を併記。出典は IPA 過去問 (改変=OCR修復+翻訳)。

stem.zh: 根据《劳动者派遣法》，A公司决定将Y先生派遣到B公司。此时成立的关系中，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Under the Worker Dispatch Act, Company A is going to dispatch Mr. Y to Company B. Which of the following relationships is established in this case?

ア.zh: A公司与B公司之间的委托关系
ア.en: A commission (entrustment) relationship between Company A and Company B

イ.zh: A公司与Y先生之间的劳动者派遣合同关系
イ.en: A worker dispatch contract relationship between Company A and Mr. Y

ウ.zh: B公司与Y先生之间的雇佣关系
ウ.en: An employment relationship between Company B and Mr. Y

エ.zh: B公司与Y先生之间的指挥命令关系
エ.en: A direction-and-command relationship between Company B and Mr. Y

stem.zh:
某制造商本期损益的预估如表所示，但之后广告宣传费增加了 5 亿日元，持有股票的应收股利增加了 3 亿日元。此时，最终的营业利润和经常利润分别为多少亿日元？这里，除广告宣传费和持有股票的应收股利之外，其余项目均与预估相符。

单位 亿日元

| 项目 | 金额 |
|---|---|
| 销售额 | 1,000 |
| 销售成本 | 780 |
| 销售费用及一般管理费 | 130 |
| 营业外收益 | 20 |
| 营业外费用 | 16 |
| 特别利得 | 2 |
| 特别损失 | 1 |
| 企业所得税、居民税及事业税 | 50 |
stem.en:
A manufacturer's projected profit and loss for the current period is shown in the table, but afterward its advertising expenses increased by 500 million yen and the dividends receivable on its held shares increased by 300 million yen. In this case, what are the final operating profit and ordinary profit, respectively, in hundreds of millions of yen? Here, assume that everything other than the advertising expenses and the dividends receivable on held shares turned out as projected.

Unit: hundred million yen

| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| Net sales | 1,000 |
| Cost of sales | 780 |
| Selling, general and administrative expenses | 130 |
| Non-operating income | 20 |
| Non-operating expenses | 16 |
| Extraordinary gains | 2 |
| Extraordinary losses | 1 |
| Corporate tax, inhabitant tax and enterprise tax | 50 |

ア.zh: 营业利润 85 / 经常利润 92
ア.en: Operating profit 85 / Ordinary profit 92

イ.zh: 营业利润 85 / 经常利润 93
イ.en: Operating profit 85 / Ordinary profit 93

ウ.zh: 营业利润 220 / 经常利润 92
ウ.en: Operating profit 220 / Ordinary profit 92

エ.zh: 营业利润 220 / 经常利润 93
エ.en: Operating profit 220 / Ordinary profit 93

単位 億円

| 項目 | 金額 |
|---|---|

| 売上原価 | 780 |
| 販売費及び一般管理費 | 130 |
| 営業外収益 | 20 |
| 営業外費用 | 16 |
| 特別利益 | 2 |
| 特別損失 | 1 |
| 法人税，住民税及び事業税 | 50 |

stem.zh: 作为 IoT（物联网）的事例，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate example of IoT?

ア.zh: 通过用互联网连接拍卖会场与会员的 PC，会员从自己家中也能参加拍卖。
ア.en: By connecting an auction venue and members' PCs over the internet, members can participate in auctions from their own homes.

イ.zh: 通过将公司内部服务器上的群件迁移到外部数据中心的服务器，员工可以随时随地经由互联网使用它。
イ.en: By moving groupware from an in-house server to a server in an external data center, employees can use it anytime, anywhere via the internet.

ウ.zh: 通过在口服药的容器中嵌入传感器，药店可以经由互联网管理服药历史，并将其用于用药指导。
ウ.en: By embedding a sensor in the container of an oral medication, a pharmacy can manage the medication-taking history via the internet and use it for medication guidance.

エ.zh: 通过补习学校在 Web 网站上发布授课视频，学员可以使用智能手机或 PC 随时随地上课。
エ.en: By having a prep school distribute lecture videos on a website, students can attend classes anytime, anywhere using a smartphone or PC.

stem.zh: 对从材料采购到商品销售的整个流程进行统一管理，以实现供应最优化为目标的系统是哪一个？
stem.en: Which system manages the entire flow from material procurement to product sales in an integrated manner, aiming to optimize supply?

stem.zh: 对于行政机关持有的资料，规定了请求公开（披露）的权利及其手续等内容的法律是哪一项？
stem.en: Which law stipulates the right to request disclosure of documents held by administrative agencies, along with the related procedures?

イ.zh: 个人信息保护法

ウ.zh: 信息公开法

stem.zh: 作为用于分析经营环境等的 3C 分析的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following correctly describes 3C analysis, which is used for analyzing the business environment and similar purposes?

ア.zh: 从顾客、竞争对手、自身公司三个视角进行分析。
ア.en: Analysis from three perspectives: customer, competitor, and company.

イ.zh: 从最近购买日、购买频率、购买金额三个视角进行分析。
イ.en: Analysis from three perspectives: most recent purchase date, purchase frequency, and purchase amount.

ウ.zh: 分解为时代、年龄、世代三个要素进行分析。
ウ.en: Analysis by breaking down into three factors: era, age, and generation.

エ.zh: 按总销售额从高到低分为三个组进行分类分析。
エ.en: Analysis by classifying into three groups in descending order of total sales.

2019r01a-q008.stem_jp_clean:
人口減少や高齢化などを背景に, ICT を活用して, 都市や地域の機能やサービスを効率化, 高度化し, 地域課題の解決や活性化を実現することが試みられている。
このような街づくりのソリューションを示す言葉として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh:
在人口减少和老龄化等背景下，人们尝试利用 ICT 来提升城市和地区的功能与服务的效率与水平，从而实现地区课题的解决与活力的提升。
请问，表示这种城市建设解决方案的词语，最恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en:
Against the backdrop of population decline and an aging society, efforts are being made to use ICT to make the functions and services of cities and regions more efficient and advanced, thereby solving regional issues and revitalizing communities.
Which of the following is the most appropriate term to describe this kind of urban development solution?

ア.zh: 容量（Capacity）
ア.en: Capacity

イ.zh: 智慧城市（Smart city）
イ.en: Smart city

ウ.zh: 多样性（Diversity）
ウ.en: Diversity

エ.zh: 大学（University）
エ.en: University

stem.zh:
在 DFD 中，除数据流和处理（功能）以外所描述的内容，将其全部且仅这些列出的是哪一项？

a　数据处理所需的时间
b　数据的存储位置
c　数据的来源和输出目的地
stem.en:
In a DFD, which option lists all and only the items that are described other than data flows and processes (functions)?

a  The time required to process the data
b  The location where data is stored
c  The source and the destination of the data

ア.zh: a, b
ア.en: a, b

イ.zh: a, b, c
イ.en: a, b, c

ウ.zh: b, c
ウ.en: b, c

エ.zh: c
エ.en: c

2019r01a-q009.stem_jp_clean:
DFD において，データフローや処理（機能）以外に記述されるものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。

a　データの処理に要する時間
b　データの蓄積場所
c　データの発生源や出力先

stem.zh: 在企业的联盟（alliance）战略中，关于合资企业（joint venture）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among corporate alliance strategies, which is an appropriate description of a joint venture?

ア.zh: 由两家及以上的企业共同出资并共同经营的企业。
ア.en: A company jointly funded and operated by two or more companies.

イ.zh: 企业之间通过相互出资、相互持股等方式结成的协作关系。
イ.en: Forming a cooperative relationship between companies through mutual investment, cross-shareholding, and the like.

ウ.zh: 通过企业的合并或收购取得对方企业的控制权。
ウ.en: Acquiring control over another company through merger or acquisition of the company.

エ.zh: 授予对方使用与技术、品牌、销售活动等相关权利的许可。
エ.en: Granting permission to use rights related to technology, brands, sales activities, and so on.

stem.zh: 在信息系统战略中，为衡量所定义目标的达成情况，表示重要绩效评价指标的术语是哪一个？
stem.en: In an information systems strategy, which term refers to the key performance indicator used to measure the degree of achievement of a defined goal?

ア.zh: BPO
ア.en: BPO

イ.zh: CSR
イ.en: CSR

ウ.zh: KPI
ウ.en: KPI

エ.zh: ROA
エ.en: ROA

stem.zh: 作为企业制定经营理念的意义，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate significance of formulating a company's management philosophy?

ア.zh: 能够具体展示为实现企业经营战略而制定的行动计划。
ア.en: It can concretely present the action plan for realizing the company's management strategy.

イ.zh: 能够明确为实现企业经营目标而设定的设想方案。
イ.en: It can clarify the scenario for realizing the company's business goals.

ウ.zh: 能够明确企业的存在理由和价值观。
ウ.en: It can clarify the company's reason for existence and its values.

エ.zh: 能够展示企业希望达到的未来愿景。
エ.en: It can present the future vision that the company wants to reach.

stem.zh: 关于 IoT（物联网）的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of IoT?

ア.zh: 人工智能中的学习机制
ア.en: The learning mechanism in artificial intelligence

イ.zh: 搭载传感器的设备、控制装置等直接连接到互联网，并通过网络相互交换各种信息的机制
イ.en: A mechanism in which devices equipped with sensors, control units, and the like connect directly to the Internet and exchange various kinds of information with one another over the network

ウ.zh: 将软件的部分功能公开，以便其他程序可以使用的一组函数或过程
ウ.en: A collection of functions and procedures that exposes part of a software's functionality so that it can be used by other programs

エ.zh: 利用软件机器人来提高日常例行工作效率的工具
エ.en: A tool that uses software robots to make routine, standardized tasks more efficient

stem.zh: 关于 CAD 的说明，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of CAD?

ア.zh: 指将模拟信号转换为数字信号的电路
ア.en: A circuit that converts analog signals into digital signals

イ.zh: 指利用计算机进行建筑物、工业产品等的设计
イ.en: Using a computer to design buildings, industrial products, and the like

ウ.zh: 指将光转换为电信号的图像传感器
ウ.en: An image sensor that converts light into electrical signals

エ.zh: 指将文字、图像、声音等数据组合起来制作出一个内容
エ.en: Combining data such as text, images, and audio to create a single piece of content

2019r01a-q015.stem_jp_clean: 自社の商品やサービスの情報を主体的に収集する見込み客の獲得を目的に, 企業がSNSやブログ, 検索エンジンなどを利用して商品やサービスに関連する情報を発信する。このようにして獲得した見込み客を, 最終的に顧客に転換させることを目標とするマーケティング手法として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为了获取那些会主动收集本公司商品或服务信息的潜在客户，企业利用 SNS、博客、搜索引擎等渠道发布与商品或服务相关的信息。把以这种方式获取的潜在客户最终转化为正式客户作为目标的营销手法，最恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: With the goal of acquiring prospective customers who actively gather information about a company's products or services, a company uses SNS, blogs, search engines, and similar channels to publish information related to its products or services. Which is the most appropriate marketing method that aims to ultimately convert the prospective customers acquired in this way into actual customers?

ア.zh: 出站营销（外向式营销）
ア.en: Outbound marketing

イ.zh: 集客式营销（入站营销）
イ.en: Inbound marketing

ウ.zh: 直复营销
ウ.en: Direct Marketing

エ.zh: 电话营销
エ.en: Telemarketing

2019r01a-q016.stem_jp_clean: システム導入を検討している企業や官公庁などが RFI を実施する目的として、最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 正在考虑引入系统的企业或政府机关等实施 RFI（信息征询书）的目的，下列哪一项最为恰当？
stem.en: Which of the following best describes the purpose for which a company or government agency considering the introduction of a system carries out an RFI (Request For Information)?

ア.zh: 从供应商企业获取系统的详细报价金额，确定合同金额。
ア.en: Obtain a detailed quotation amount for the system from vendor companies and finalize the contract amount.

イ.zh: 向供应商企业收集信息，掌握系统的技术课题与可行性。
イ.en: Gather information from vendor companies to grasp the technical issues and feasibility of the system.

ウ.zh: 消除与供应商企业之间的认识偏差，使交易合理化。
ウ.en: Eliminate gaps in understanding with vendor companies and make transactions appropriate.

エ.zh: 要求供应商企业提交提案书，确定发包对象。
エ.en: Request vendor companies to submit proposals and decide on the supplier to place the order with.

stem.zh: 关于创新者窘境的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of the innovator's dilemma?

ア.zh: 初次消费某商品时所感受到的价值或满足度，随着消费量的增加而逐渐下降的现象。
ア.en: A phenomenon in which the value or satisfaction felt when first consuming a product gradually declines as the quantity consumed increases.

イ.zh: 在本公司现有商品已占据份额的市场中投入本公司的新商品，从而抢走现有商品份额的现象。
イ.en: A phenomenon in which introducing one's own new product into a market where one's own existing product already holds share ends up taking share away from that existing product.

ウ.zh: 全部销售额的大部分由少数客户所占据的状态。
ウ.en: A state in which the majority of total sales is accounted for by a small number of customers.

エ.zh: 优秀的大企业相比于追求革新性技术，更专注于通过提升现有技术来确保份额，结果却在市场上未能确保份额的现象。
エ.en: A phenomenon in which an excellent large company focuses on securing market share by improving existing technology rather than pursuing innovative technology, and as a result fails to secure share in the market.

2019r01a-q018.stem_jp_clean: 銀行などの預金者の資産を, AI が自動的に運用するサービスを提供するなど, 金融業において IT 技術を活用して, これまでにない革新的なサービスを開拓する取組を示す用語はどれか。

stem.zh: 在金融业中运用 IT 技术（例如提供由 AI 自动运营银行等存款人资产的服务），开拓前所未有的创新型服务的举措，用哪个术语来表示？
stem.en: Which term refers to the effort to develop unprecedented, innovative services by using IT in the financial industry, such as providing services in which AI automatically manages the assets of depositors at banks and the like?

ア.zh: FA
ア.en: FA

イ.zh: FinTech（金融科技）
イ.en: FinTech

ウ.zh: OA
ウ.en: OA

エ.zh: 共享经济
エ.en: Sharing economy

stem.zh: 以达成特定目的或解决某个课题为主题，软件开发者和策划者等人在短时间内集中地相互提出创意，进行软件开发等协作工作，并比拼成果的活动是哪一个？
stem.en: Which of the following is an event where software developers, planners, and others gather around the theme of achieving a specific goal or solving a particular problem, intensively share ideas over a short period, collaborate on tasks such as software development, and compete on their results?

ア.zh: 大型会议（Convention）
ア.en: Convention

イ.zh: 贸易展会（Trade fair）
イ.en: Trade fair

ウ.zh: 黑客马拉松（Hackathon）
ウ.en: Hackathon

エ.zh: 招待会（Reception）
エ.en: Reception

2019r01a-q020.stem_jp_clean: 事業活動における重要な技術情報について, 営業秘密とするための要件を定めている法律はどれか。

stem.zh: 对于经营活动中重要的技术信息，规定将其认定为商业秘密所需要件的法律是哪一项？
stem.en: Which law defines the requirements for treating important technical information in business activities as a trade secret?

ア.zh: 著作权法
ア.en: Copyright Act

イ.zh: 特定商业交易法
イ.en: Act on Specified Commercial Transactions

ウ.zh: 禁止非法访问法
ウ.en: Act on the Prohibition of Unauthorized Computer Access

エ.zh: 反不正当竞争法
エ.en: Unfair Competition Prevention Act

stem.zh: 关于深度学习的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of deep learning?

ア.zh: 在销售、市场营销、售后服务等与客户相关的各部门之间整合信息和业务流程的机制
ア.en: A mechanism that integrates information and business flows across customer-related departments such as sales, marketing, and after-sales service

イ.zh: 利用计算机等数字设备和通信网络实施的教育、学习、培训的形式
イ.en: A form of education, learning, and training carried out using digital devices such as computers and communication networks

ウ.zh: 将组织内每个人所拥有的知识和诀窍在整个组织内共享并加以有效利用的机制
ウ.en: A mechanism that shares the knowledge and know-how held by each individual in an organization across the whole organization and uses it effectively

エ.zh: 通过模仿人类脑神经回路的模型对大量数据进行分析，使计算机自身提取并学习数据特征的技术
エ.en: A technology in which a computer itself extracts and learns the features of data by analyzing large amounts of data using a model that mimics the neural circuits of the human brain

stem.zh: 作为人工智能的应用实例，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate example of using artificial intelligence (AI)?

ア.zh: 在驾驶员不参与的情况下，由系统完成汽车的加速、转向和制动的全部操作。
ア.en: Without any involvement of the driver, the system handles all of the car's acceleration, steering, and braking.

イ.zh: 在办公室的空调系统中，可以实时掌握会议室和洗手间的空闲状况。
イ.en: In an office air-conditioning system, the vacancy status of meeting rooms and restrooms can be known in real time.

ウ.zh: 即使不设置像银行那样的中央管理者，也能通过分布式的共识形成技术来完成交易的批准。
ウ.en: Even without placing a central administrator such as a bank, transactions are approved by a distributed consensus-building technology.

エ.zh: 从家中的 PC 按事先设定的内容，即使不去柜台也能自动进行转账或汇款。
エ.en: From a PC at home, according to what was decided in advance, transfers and remittances are carried out automatically without going to a counter.

2019r01a-q023.stem_jp_clean: 統計学や機械学習などの手法を用いて大量のデータを解析して, 新たなサービスや価値を生み出すためのヒントやアイディアを抽出する役割が重要となっている。その役割を担う人材として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 运用统计学和机器学习等方法对大量数据进行分析, 从中提炼出能够创造新服务或新价值的线索与创意, 这样的角色正变得日益重要。担任该角色最合适的人才是以下哪一项?
stem.en: Using methods such as statistics and machine learning to analyze large volumes of data and extract hints and ideas for creating new services and value has become an important role. Which of the following is the most appropriate type of professional to take on this role?

ア.zh: IT战略师 (IT Strategist)
ア.en: IT Strategist

イ.zh: 系统架构师 (System Architect)
イ.en: System Architect

ウ.zh: 系统分析师 (System Analyst)
ウ.en: System Analyst

エ.zh: 数据科学家 (Data Scientist)
エ.en: Data Scientist

stem.zh: 关于著作权法中著作权的叙述，下列哪一项是适当的？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about copyright under the Copyright Act is appropriate?

ア.zh: 当两部内容偶然相似的著作物在同一时期被创作出来时，著作权仅认定给其中一方著作者。
ア.en: When two works that happen to have similar content are created at the same time, copyright is granted to only one of the authors.

イ.zh: 著作权无需经过取得权利的申请或登记等手续。
イ.en: Copyright does not require any procedures such as application or registration to acquire the right.

ウ.zh: 著作权法的保护对象也包含技术思想。
ウ.en: The subject matter protected by the Copyright Act also includes technical ideas.

エ.zh: 著作物除了独创性之外还必须同时具备新颖性。
エ.en: A work must possess novelty in addition to creativity.

stem.zh:
产品A的生产计划量、部件B的总需求量及库存量如表所示时，第2周中部件B的订货量a为多少个？

〔条件〕
・产品A的生产提前期（从着手到完成的期间）忽略不计。
・生产1个产品A需要2个部件B，部件B仅用于产品A的生产，不作他用。
・部件B的订货在各周的生产结束时进行，并在下一周生产开始前入库。
・部件B的安全库存量为当周部件B总需求量的25%。
・部件B第1周生产开始时的库存量为100个。

单位 个
| | 第1周 | 第2周 | 第3周 |
| 产品A的生产计划量 | 40 | 40 | 20 |
| 部件B的总需求量 | 80 | 80 | 40 |
| 部件B的库存量（生产结束后） | 20 | | |
| 部件B的订货量 | | a | |

注：阴影部分未显示。
stem.en:
Given that the planned production quantity for product A and the gross requirements and inventory quantities for part B are as shown in the table, how many units is the order quantity a of part B in week 2?

[Conditions]
- The production lead time of product A (the period from start to completion) is ignored.
- Producing one unit of product A requires two units of part B, and part B is used only for producing product A.
- Part B is ordered at the end of production each week and arrives before the start of production the following week.
- The safety stock of part B is 25% of the gross requirement of part B for that week.
- The inventory of part B at the start of production in week 1 is 100 units.

Unit: pieces
| | Week 1 | Week 2 | Week 3 |
| Production plan of product A | 40 | 40 | 20 |
| Gross requirement of part B | 80 | 80 | 40 |
| Inventory of part B (after production) | 20 | | |
| Order quantity of part B | | a | |

Note: Shaded cells are not shown.

2019r01a-q026.stem_jp_clean:
製品Aの生産計画量，部品Bの総所要量及び在庫量が表のとおりであるとき，第2週における部品Bの発注量aは何個か。

〔条件〕
・製品Aの生産リードタイム（着手から完成までの期間）は無視する。
・製品Aを1個生産するために部品Bが2個必要であり，部品Bは製品Aの生産以外には使われない。
・部品Bの発注は，各週の生産終了時に行い，翌週の生産開始までに入荷する。
・部品Bの安全在庫量は，当該週の部品Bの総所要量の25%とする。
・部品Bの第1週の生産開始時の在庫量を100個とする。

単位 個
| | 第1週 | 第2週 | 第3週 |
| 製品Aの生産計画量 | 40 | 40 | 20 |
| 部品Bの総所要量 | 80 | 80 | 40 |
| 部品Bの在庫量（生産終了後） | 20 | | |
| 部品Bの発注量 | | a | |

注記 網掛けの部分は表示していない。

stem.en: Which department is suitable for introducing SFA (Sales Force Automation) in order to improve operational efficiency?

stem.zh: 关于 SEO 的说明，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate description of SEO?

ア.zh: 向在 SNS 上创建的社区的参与者，显示符合该社区目的的检索结果。
ア.en: Displaying search results that match the purpose of a community for the participants of that community set up on an SNS.

イ.zh: 使用搜索引擎解析本公司 Web 网站的访问日志，检查是否存在非法访问。
イ.en: Using a search engine to analyze the access logs of one's own Web site, and checking whether there has been any unauthorized access.

ウ.zh: 下功夫使得当用户使用搜索引擎进行关键词检索时，本公司的 Web 网站能显示在检索结果的靠前位置。
ウ.en: Devising ways so that one's own Web site is displayed near the top of the search results when a user performs a keyword search using a search engine.

エ.zh: 调查用户希望使用什么样的搜索引擎，并开发符合需求的搜索引擎。
エ.en: Investigating what kind of search engine users want, and developing a search engine that meets those needs.

stem.zh: 作为设计思维的示例，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which is the most appropriate example of design thinking?

ア.zh: 使用定义了网页布局等的样式表来设计主页。
ア.en: Design a homepage using a style sheet that defines the layout and so on of web pages.

イ.zh: 方法的核心始终是产品或服务的使用者，基于使用者的本质需求来设计产品或服务。
イ.en: The center of the approach is always the user of the product or service, and the product or service is designed based on the user's essential needs.

ウ.zh: 以实现业务的快速化和高效化为目的，从根本上重新设计业务流程。
ウ.en: Radically redesign business processes with the aim of speeding up and improving the efficiency of operations.

エ.zh: 将其视为具备数据和处理过程的对象的集合，对整个信息系统进行设计。
エ.en: Capture it as a collection of objects equipped with data and procedures, and design the entire information system.

stem.zh: 通过运用 RFID（射频识别）能够实现的事项，下列哪项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following can be achieved by using RFID (Radio Frequency Identification)?

ア.zh: 实时掌握正在行驶的出租车的当前位置。
ア.en: Track the current location of a moving taxi in real time.

イ.zh: 在网络销售等场景中对信息进行加密，以确保通信的安全性。
イ.en: Encrypt information in online sales and the like to ensure communication security.

ウ.zh: 在进入大楼时，识别指纹或虹膜等身体特征以对个人进行认证。
ウ.en: Authenticate an individual by identifying physical features such as fingerprints or iris patterns upon entering a building.

エ.zh: 在借出或归还图书时，将多本书一次性集中处理。
エ.en: Process multiple books at once when checking out or returning library books.

2019r01a-q032.stem_jp_clean: 一般消費者向けの製品を製造している A 社では, 新製品の開発に当たって, 市場を取り巻くマクロ環境を政治, 経済, 社会, 技術の観点について分析することにした。このときに収集すべき情報として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 生产面向一般消费者产品的 A 公司，在开发新产品时，决定从政治、经济、社会、技术这几个角度分析围绕市场的宏观环境。此时应收集的信息中，最适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Company A, which manufactures products for general consumers, has decided to analyze the macro environment surrounding the market from the perspectives of politics, economy, society, and technology when developing a new product. Which is the most appropriate information to collect at this time?

ア.zh: 竞争企业的经营战略
ア.en: The business strategies of competing companies

イ.zh: 竞争企业的财务状况
イ.en: The financial status of competing companies

ウ.zh: 主要供应商的原材料价格
ウ.en: The raw material prices of major suppliers

エ.zh: 我国的老龄化率
エ.en: Our country's aging rate

stem.zh: 作为 RPA（Robotic Process Automation，机器人流程自动化）的应用实例，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate example of RPA (Robotic Process Automation)?

ア.zh: 一种仅代替人类自动执行高度且非定型判断的软件，从求职网站上登记的数据中筛选出招聘候选人。
ア.en: Software that automatically performs only highly advanced, non-routine judgments on behalf of humans selects job candidates from data entered on a recruitment website.

イ.zh: 一台人形机器人代替人类自动执行银行柜台接待等非定型业务。
イ.en: A human-shaped robot automatically performs non-routine tasks such as serving customers at a bank counter on behalf of humans.

ウ.zh: 一种代替人类自动执行已规则化的定型操作的软件，将通过互联网受理的订单数据转录到配送系统中。
ウ.en: Software that automatically performs rule-based, routine operations on behalf of humans transcribes order data received over the Internet into a delivery system.

エ.zh: 一台机器人代替人类在工厂生产现场自动执行组装等定型作业。
エ.en: A robot automatically performs routine tasks such as assembly at a factory production site on behalf of humans.

2019r01a-q035.stem_jp_clean: 持続可能な世界を実現するために国連が採択した、2030年までに達成されるべき開発目標を示す言葉として、最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 系统审计的目的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which one is the purpose of a systems audit?

ア.zh: 在信息系统运行阶段，对重要数据进行备份。
ア.en: Taking backups of important data during the information system operation stage.

イ.zh: 提升信息系统开发人员的技能水平。
イ.en: Improving the skills of information system development staff.

ウ.zh: 在信息系统规划阶段调查用户需求，并将其形成文档作为系统化要求。
ウ.en: Surveying user needs during the information system planning stage and documenting them as systemization requirements.

エ.zh: 控制与信息系统相关的风险，使信息系统安全、有效且高效地运行。
エ.en: Controlling the risks related to the information system so that the information system functions safely, effectively, and efficiently.

stem.zh: 关于内部控制中监控的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of monitoring in internal control?

ア.zh: 持续评估内部控制是否有效运行的过程
ア.en: A process of continuously evaluating whether internal control is functioning effectively

イ.zh: 促进遵守与内部控制相关的法令及其他规范的过程
イ.en: A process of promoting compliance with laws, regulations, and other norms related to internal control

ウ.zh: 构建内部控制体制的过程
ウ.en: A process of building the framework of internal control

エ.zh: 分析阻碍内部控制的风险的过程
エ.en: A process of analyzing risks that hinder internal control

2019r01a-q038.stem_jp_clean: システム開発プロジェクトの開始時に, 開発途中で利用者から仕様変更要求が多く出てプロジェクトの進捗に影響が出ることが予想された。品質悪化や納期遅れにならないようにする対応策として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在系统开发项目启动时，预计在开发过程中用户会频繁提出规格变更要求，从而影响项目进度。为了避免质量下降或交付期延误，最恰当的应对措施是哪一个？
stem.en: At the start of a system development project, it was anticipated that users would make many specification change requests during development, affecting the project's progress. As a measure to prevent quality deterioration or delivery delays, which is the most appropriate response?

ア.zh: 向客户声明：设计完成后将不再接受变更要求。
ア.en: Declare to the customer that no change requests will be accepted after the design is completed.

イ.zh: 当中途出现延误时，省略测试以缩短测试期间。
イ.en: If a delay occurs midway, omit testing to shorten the testing period.

ウ.zh: 在计划中纳入：当变更要求大量出现时，取消功能的实现。
ウ.en: Include in the plan that the implementation of functions will be cancelled when many change requests arise.

エ.zh: 事先与客户就变更要求的优先级确定方式和应对范围达成一致。
エ.en: Reach agreement with the customer in advance on how to prioritize change requests and the scope of response.

stem.zh: 作为共通框架（共通フレーム）定义中所包含的内容，适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is included in the definition of the Common Frame (Common Frame of Software Life Cycle Process)?

ア.zh: 关于各工序中所创建交付物的文档化的详细规定
ア.en: Detailed rules concerning the documentation of the deliverables produced in each process step

イ.zh: 系统开发与维护各工序的作业项目
イ.en: The work items of each process step in system development and maintenance

ウ.zh: 关于构成系统的软件的可靠性级别、可维护性级别等度量指标的规定
ウ.en: Rules concerning metrics such as the reliability level and maintainability level of the software that makes up the system

エ.zh: 关于构成系统的硬件开发的详细作业项目
エ.en: Detailed work items concerning the development of the hardware that makes up the system

2019r01a-q040.stem_jp_clean: アジャイル開発の方法論であるスクラムに関する記述として，適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于敏捷开发方法论之一的 Scrum 的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of Scrum, a methodology for agile development?

ア.zh: 为了改进软件开发组织及项目的过程，将该组织的成熟度等级分阶段地加以定义的产物。
ア.en: It defines, in stages, the maturity levels of an organization in order to improve the processes of a software development organization and its projects.

イ.zh: 在软件开发及其交易中，为了让取得方与供应方拥有衡量工作内容的共同尺度而加以定义的产物。
イ.en: It defines a common yardstick for the work content so that the acquirer and the supplier can share it in software development and its transactions.

ウ.zh: 是一种应对复杂且变化剧烈问题的系统开发框架，被定义为一种反复且渐进的方法。
ウ.en: It is a framework for system development to cope with complex and rapidly changing problems, defined as an iterative and incremental approach.

エ.zh: 是将项目管理的知识体系化的产物，由多个知识领域加以定义。
エ.en: It is a systematized body of project management knowledge, defined from multiple knowledge areas.

stem.zh: 关于项目管理推进方式的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate explanation of how project management is carried out?

ア.zh: 按照规划、需求定义、系统开发、维护的顺序进行开发。
ア.en: Carry out development in the order of planning, requirements definition, system development, and maintenance.

イ.zh: 以战略、设计、迁移、运营、改进的生命周期来维持 IT 服务。
イ.en: Maintain IT services through the lifecycle of strategy, design, transition, operation, and improvement.

ウ.zh: 制定实现目标的计划，在执行过程中对质量、进度、成本等进行控制，引导达成目标。
ウ.en: Create a plan to achieve the goal, control quality, schedule, cost, and so on during execution, and lead the work toward achieving the goal.

エ.zh: 按照初步调查、正式调查、评估、结论的顺序，确认风险的识别与控制是否得到了恰当的实施。
エ.en: In the order of preliminary investigation, main investigation, evaluation, and conclusion, confirm whether the identification and control of risks are being carried out appropriately.

stem.zh: 在系统开发中使用的箭线图（Arrow Diagram）的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the arrow diagram used in system development?

ア.zh: 表示业务数据流向的图。
ア.en: A diagram that represents the flow of business data.

イ.zh: 用网络形式表示作业之间关联关系的图。
イ.en: A diagram that represents the relationships among tasks as a network.

ウ.zh: 以作业为纵轴，用横条表示各作业所需时长的图。
ウ.en: A diagram that places tasks on the vertical axis and represents the duration of each task with horizontal bars.

エ.zh: 表示软件中数据之间关系的图。
エ.en: A diagram that represents the relationships among data in software.

stem.zh: 关于利用 AI 的聊天机器人，下列哪一项是最恰当的事例？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate example of a chatbot that uses AI?

ア.zh: 通过让一切物品经由互联网相互连接，使人能够在外出时从智能设备打开家中空调的开关等。
ア.en: By having all sorts of things connect to each other via the Internet, it becomes possible to do things like turning on the air conditioner at home from a smart device while you are out.

イ.zh: 通过让计算机大量识别并学习各种动物的图像，使其能够区分狗和猫的图像。
イ.en: By having a computer recognize and learn from a large volume of images of various animals, it becomes able to distinguish between images of dogs and cats.

ウ.zh: 当写下关于商品操作方法等的问题时，拥有详细知识的人会发帖给出回答或建议。
ウ.en: When you post a question about how to operate a product, a knowledgeable person posts an answer or advice.

エ.zh: 在商品销售网站上，当用户输入所需商品的功能等内容时，计算机会根据这些内容以对话的形式介绍推荐的商品。
エ.en: On a product sales site, when a user inputs the features they want in a product, the computer introduces recommended products in a conversational manner according to that input.

stem.zh: 为缩短业务处理时间，对运行中的业务系统的处理能力进行了改善。在实施系统审计以评价该改善是否有效时，系统审计人员向运维部门要求提供的信息，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: To shorten business processing time, the processing capacity of an operating business system was improved. When conducting a systems audit to evaluate whether this improvement is effective, which of the following is the appropriate piece of information that the systems auditor should request from the operations department?

ア.zh: 运行统计资料
ア.en: Operating statistics data

イ.zh: 系统运维体制
イ.en: System operations structure

ウ.zh: 系统运维手册
ウ.en: System operations manual

2019r01a-q047.stem_jp_clean:
ソフトウェアの品質を判定する指標として，機能単位の不良件数をその開発規模で割った値を「不良密度」と定義する。不良密度の下限値と上限値を設定し，実績値がその範囲を逸脱した場合に問題ありと判定するとき，A工程では問題がなく，B工程で問題があると判定される機能はどれか。ここで，不良密度の下限値は0.25件／KS，上限値は0.65件／KS とする。また，不良密度の下限値，上限値及び開発規模は，両工程とも同じとする。

| 機能 | 開発規模(KS) | A工程の不良件数(件) | B工程の不良件数(件) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 機能1 | 10 | 6 | 3 |
| 機能2 | 20 | 14 | 10 |
| 機能3 | 50 | 10 | 40 |
| 機能4 | 80 | 32 | 8 |

stem.zh:
作为判定软件质量的指标，将某功能单位的缺陷件数除以其开发规模所得的值定义为「缺陷密度」。设定缺陷密度的下限值和上限值，当实测值超出该范围时判定为存在问题。在此前提下，被判定为在 A 工序无问题、在 B 工序存在问题的功能是哪一个？此处，缺陷密度的下限值为 0.25 件/KS，上限值为 0.65 件/KS。此外，缺陷密度的下限值、上限值及开发规模在两道工序中均相同。

| 功能 | 开发规模(KS) | A 工序的缺陷件数(件) | B 工序的缺陷件数(件) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 功能1 | 10 | 6 | 3 |
| 功能2 | 20 | 14 | 10 |
| 功能3 | 50 | 10 | 40 |
| 功能4 | 80 | 32 | 8 |
stem.en:
As a metric for judging software quality, the «defect density» is defined as the number of defects per function unit divided by its development size. A lower limit and an upper limit for the defect density are set, and when the actual value falls outside that range, it is judged to have a problem. Under these conditions, which function is judged to have no problem in process A but to have a problem in process B? Here, the lower limit of the defect density is 0.25 defects/KS and the upper limit is 0.65 defects/KS. The lower limit, the upper limit, and the development size of the defect density are the same in both processes.

| Function | Development size (KS) | Defects in process A (count) | Defects in process B (count) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Function 1 | 10 | 6 | 3 |
| Function 2 | 20 | 14 | 10 |
| Function 3 | 50 | 10 | 40 |
| Function 4 | 80 | 32 | 8 |

ア.zh: 功能1
ア.en: Function 1

イ.zh: 功能2
イ.en: Function 2

ウ.zh: 功能3
ウ.en: Function 3

エ.zh: 功能4
エ.en: Function 4

イ.zh: 由于在各工序中进行原型设计，因此能够发现潜在的问题和需求。

エ.zh: 相比编写文档更优先编写软件，能够迅速纳入客户不断变化的需求。

エ.en: Prevent data inconsistency when multiple programs access the same data simultaneously.

2019r01a-q067.stem_jp_clean: 重要な情報を保管している部屋がある。この部屋への不正な入室及び室内での重要な情報への不正アクセスに関する対策として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 有一个存放重要信息的房间。针对非法进入该房间以及在室内对重要信息进行非法访问的对策，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: There is a room that stores important information. Which of the following is the most appropriate countermeasure against unauthorized entry into this room and unauthorized access to the important information inside it?

ア.zh: 通过保安人员和监控摄像头进行出入室确认和室内作业监控。

2019r01a-q071.stem_jp_clean: 複数の IoT デバイスとそれらを管理する IoT サーバで構成される IoT システムにおける, エッジコンピューティングに関する記述として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在由多个 IoT 设备以及管理这些设备的 IoT 服务器构成的 IoT 系统中, 关于边缘计算的描述, 恰当的是哪一项?
stem.en: In an IoT system consisting of multiple IoT devices and an IoT server that manages them, which of the following is an appropriate description of edge computing?

ア.zh: 在另一台服务器上放置 IoT 服务器上数据库的副本, 并使两者始终保持同步运行。
ア.en: Place a replica of the database on the IoT server on another server as well, and operate them so that the two are always kept synchronized.

イ.zh: 在 IoT 设备群附近配置计算机, 让其执行有助于减轻 IoT 服务器负载并提升 IoT 系统实时性的处理。
イ.en: Place a computer near the group of IoT devices and have it perform processing that is effective for reducing the load on the IoT server and improving the real-time performance of the IoT system.

ウ.zh: 根据 IoT 设备与 IoT 服务器之间通信负载的状况, 自动优化网络的构成。
ウ.en: Automatically optimize the network configuration according to the state of the communication load between the IoT devices and the IoT server.

エ.zh: 让 IoT 设备以较少的电力运行, 用普通电池实现长期连续运行。
エ.en: Operate IoT devices with low power consumption so that they can run continuously for a long period using ordinary batteries.

2019r01a-q072.stem_jp_clean: 3人の候補者の中から兼任も許す方法で委員長と書記を1名ずつ選ぶ場合, 3人の中から委員長1名の選び方が3通りで, 3人の中から書記1名の選び方が3通りであるので, 委員長と書記の選び方は全部で9通りある。5人の候補者の中から兼任も許す方法で委員長と書記を1名ずつ選ぶ場合, 選び方は何通りあるか。

stem.zh: 从3名候选人中以允许兼任的方式各选出1名委员长和1名书记时，从3人中选出1名委员长有3种选法，从3人中选出1名书记有3种选法，因此委员长和书记的选法共有9种。从5名候选人中以允许兼任的方式各选出1名委员长和1名书记时，共有多少种选法？
stem.en: When selecting one chairperson and one secretary from among 3 candidates by a method that also allows holding both posts concurrently, there are 3 ways to choose one chairperson from the 3 people and 3 ways to choose one secretary from the 3 people, so there are 9 ways in total to choose the chairperson and secretary. ア.zh: 可以让一台计算机像多台服务器一样运行，因此能够根据需求灵活地分配物理资源。
ア.en: It can make a single computer operate as if it were multiple servers, so physical resources can be flexibly allocated according to demand.

イ.zh: 通过将具备计算机功能的刀片按所需数量插入机箱来构成服务器，因此可以灵活地增减数量。
イ.en: Servers are configured by inserting as many blades with computer functions as needed into a chassis, so the number can be flexibly increased or decreased.

ウ.zh: 构成服务器的计算机在不与其他服务器连接的情况下使用，因此可以提高安全性。
ウ.en: The computers that make up a server are used without being connected to other servers, so security can be improved.

エ.zh: 构成服务器的多台计算机执行相同的处理并核对处理结果，因此可以提高可靠性。
エ.en: Multiple computers that make up a server execute the same processing and compare the processing results, so reliability can be improved.

2019r01a-q082.stem_jp_clean:

```
0 2 0 □ □ … □
```

stem.zh:
在采用如下编号体系的电话号码中，想要生成80亿个号码。号码最少需要多少位数字？此处，位数包含「020」在内。

```
0 2 0 □ □ … □
```

- 每一位指定为0～9中的任意一个（紧跟「020」之后的第一个□除外，即其后的每个□）
- 指定为1～3及5～9中的任意一个（紧跟「020」之后的第一个□）

For a telephone number with the following structure, you want to generate 8 billion numbers. What is the minimum number of digits required? Here, the digit count includes the “020”.

```
0 2 0 □ □ … □
```

- Set to one of 1 to 3 and 5 to 9 (the first □ immediately following “020”)

2019r01a-q083.stem_jp_clean:
ファイルの階層構造に関する次の記述中の a, b に入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。
階層型ファイルシステムにおいて, 最上位の階層のディレクトリを a ディレクトリという。ファイルの指定方法として, カレントディレクトリを基点として目的のファイルまでのすべてのパスを記述する方法と, ルートディレクトリを基点として目的のファイルまでの全てのパスを記述する方法がある。ルートディレクトリを基点としたファイルの指定方法を b パス指定という。

stem.zh:
关于文件层次结构的下列描述中，填入 a、b 的字句的恰当组合是哪一个？
在层次型文件系统中，最高层级的目录称为 a 目录。指定文件的方法有：以当前目录为起点，描述到目标文件的全部路径的方法；以及以根目录为起点，描述到目标文件的全部路径的方法。将以根目录为起点指定文件的方法称为 b 路径指定。
stem.en:
In the following description about the hierarchical structure of files, which is the appropriate combination of words to fill in blanks a and b?
In a hierarchical file system, the directory at the highest level is called the a directory. As methods for specifying a file, there is a method that describes the entire path to the target file starting from the current directory, and a method that describes the entire path to the target file starting from the root directory. The method of specifying a file starting from the root directory is called b path specification.

ア.zh: a：当前 / b：绝对
ア.en: a: current / b: absolute

イ.zh: a：当前 / b：相对
イ.en: a: current / b: relative

ウ.zh: a：根 / b：绝对
ウ.en: a: root / b: absolute

エ.zh: a：根 / b：相对
エ.en: a: root / b: relative

stem.zh: 在信息安全的风险管理中, 将风险应对分为风险转移、风险规避、风险接受和风险降低这四类时, 下列哪一项是风险降低的恰当示例?
stem.en: In information security risk management, when risk treatment is classified into the four types of risk transfer, avoidance, acceptance, and reduction, which of the following is an appropriate example of risk reduction?

ア.zh: 之前在互联网上向特定用户提供属于机密的信息提供服务, 但考虑到信息泄露的风险, 退出了该项服务。
ア.en: Previously provided a service over the internet that supplied confidential information to specific users, but withdrew from that service in consideration of the risk of information leakage.

イ.zh: 为应对个人信息泄露的情况, 投保了保险。
イ.en: Took out insurance to prepare for the case in which personal information is leaked.

ウ.zh: 服务器机房只有少数管理员才能进入, 设备失窃的风险很低, 因此不采取额外的对策。
ウ.en: Only a limited number of administrators can enter the server room, so the risk of equipment theft is low; therefore no additional measures are taken.

エ.zh: 为应对笔记本电脑丢失、失窃导致的信息泄露, 对保存在笔记本电脑硬盘中的信息进行加密。
エ.en: To prepare against information leakage from loss or theft of a notebook PC, the information stored on the notebook PC's HDD is encrypted.

stem.zh: 考虑将销售凭单的数据用关系数据库的表来管理。在设计销售凭单的表时，分析构成表的各字段之间的关联性，为了不发生数据的重复及不一致而将其拆分为多个表的操作是哪一项？
stem.en: Consider managing sales slip data using tables in a relational database. When designing the table for sales slips, which task involves analyzing the relationships among the fields that make up the table and splitting it into multiple tables so that data duplication and inconsistency do not occur?

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是生物特征认证（生物识别认证）的恰当示例？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of biometric authentication?

ア.zh: 通过本人手指静脉的形态进行认证。
ア.en: Authenticating by the shape of the veins in a person's finger.

イ.zh: 通过本人的数字证书进行认证。
イ.en: Authenticating with a person's digital certificate.

ウ.zh: 通过能否从写有难以辨认的字符串的图像中准确读取出字符来进行认证。
ウ.en: Authenticating by whether the characters in an image showing a hard-to-read string of characters can be read accurately.

エ.zh: 使用一次性口令进行认证。
エ.en: Authenticating using a one-time password.

2019r01a-q089.stem_jp_clean:
OSS (Open Source Software) に関する記述のうち, 適切なものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
① Web サーバとして広く用いられている Apache HTTP Server は OSS である。
② Web ブラウザである Internet Explorer は OSS である。
③ ワープロソフトや表計算ソフト, プレゼンテーションソフトなどを含むビジネス統合パッケージは開発されていない。

stem.zh:
关于 OSS（开源软件，Open Source Software）的叙述中，仅列出全部正确项的是哪一个？
① 作为 Web 服务器被广泛使用的 Apache HTTP Server 是 OSS。
② Web 浏览器 Internet Explorer 是 OSS。
③ 包含文字处理软件、电子表格软件、演示文稿软件等的商务集成套件尚未被开发出来。
stem.en:
Among the following descriptions of OSS (Open Source Software), which option lists only all the correct ones?
(1) The Apache HTTP Server, widely used as a web server, is OSS.
(2) The web browser Internet Explorer is OSS.
(3) No integrated business suite that includes word processors, spreadsheet software, presentation software, and the like has been developed.

ア.zh: ①

イ.zh: ①，②

ウ.zh: ②，③

エ.zh: ③

stem.en: Which of the following is a system that broadcasts information using electronic display devices, such as network-connected displays, in places like transportation facilities, storefronts, and public facilities?

stem.zh: 在网络中，DNS 的作用，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate role of DNS in a network?

ア.zh: 针对来自客户端的 IP 地址分配请求，从地址池中分配一个尚未使用的 IP 地址。
ア.en: In response to an IP address allocation request from a client, it allocates an unused IP address from a pool of IP addresses.

イ.zh: 接受来自客户端的文件传输请求，向客户端传输文件，或接收并保存来自客户端的文件。
イ.en: It accepts file transfer requests from clients, transfers files to clients, and receives and stores files from clients.

ウ.zh: 进行域名与 IP 地址的对应（映射）。
ウ.en: It maps domain names to IP addresses.

エ.zh: 针对来自邮件接收者的读取请求，转发邮件服务器所接收到的邮件。
エ.en: In response to a retrieval request from a mail recipient, it forwards the mail received by the mail server.

stem.zh: 将与外部通信的邮件服务器设置在 DMZ（隔离区）中，其理由中恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate reason for placing a mail server that communicates with the outside in the DMZ?

ア.zh: 为了防止附有机密文件的电子邮件被发送到外部
ア.en: To prevent emails with confidential files attached from being sent to the outside

イ.zh: 为了在员工向外部交易对象发送时对电子邮件进行加密
イ.en: To encrypt emails when an employee sends them to an external business partner

ウ.zh: 为了防止邮件列表成员的邮件地址泄露到外部
ウ.en: To prevent the email addresses of mailing list members from leaking to the outside

エ.zh: 为了不让邮件服务器被当作跳板，从外部入侵公司内部网络
エ.en: To prevent the mail server from being used as a stepping stone to intrude into the internal company network from the outside

2019r01a-q093.stem_jp_clean:
ディジタル署名やブロックチェーンなどで利用されているハッシュ関数の特徴に関する,次の記述中のa,bに入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。

关于数字签名、区块链等所使用的散列函数的特征，下列描述中填入 a、b 处的字句的恰当组合是哪一项？

stem.en:
Which is the appropriate combination of words to put in blanks a and b in the following description about the characteristics of the hash function used in digital signatures, blockchains, and so on?
Using a hash function, identical data is converted into ［ a ］ hash value, and restoring the original data from the converted hash value is ［ b ］.

ア.zh: a: 每次都不同 / b: 无法做到

[ a ] は [ b ] 処理用に開発されたプロセッサである。CPU に内蔵されている場合も多いが、より高度な [ b ] 処理を行う場合には、高性能な [ a ] を搭載した拡張ボードを用いることもある。

2019r01a-q097.stem_jp_clean: 情報セキュリティの三大要素である機密性, 完全性及び可用性に関する記述のうち, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于信息安全三大要素（机密性、完整性和可用性）的描述中，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following statements about confidentiality, integrity, and availability—the three main elements of information security—is the most appropriate?

ア.zh: 确保可用性可以降低使用者不慎造成信息泄露的风险。
ア.en: Ensuring availability lowers the risk of a user inadvertently causing an information leak.

イ.zh: 确保完整性的方法之一是将系统和设备双重化，以维持使用者随时都能使用的环境。
イ.en: An example of a method to ensure integrity is duplicating systems and equipment to maintain an environment that users can access at any time.

ウ.zh: 机密性与可用性具有相互对立的一面，因此在实际运营中需要均衡地确保两者。
ウ.en: Confidentiality and availability have mutually conflicting aspects, so in actual operations it is necessary to ensure both in a well-balanced manner.

エ.zh: 确保机密性的方法之一是为防止数据丢失而进行备份，以及为防止误输入而进行输入检查。
エ.en: An example of a method to ensure confidentiality is performing backups to prevent data loss and input checks to prevent erroneous input.

stem.zh: 攻击者让勒索软件感染他人 PC 的目的是哪一项？
stem.en: What is the attacker's aim in infecting someone else's PC with ransomware?

ア.zh: 通过网络获取 PC 内的个人信息。
ア.en: Obtain the personal information stored on the PC via the network.

イ.zh: 使 PC 内的文件无法使用，并以解除限制为交换条件索取钱财。
イ.en: Make the files on the PC unusable and demand money in exchange for unlocking them.

ウ.zh: 通过网络获取在 PC 键盘上输入的字符串。
ウ.en: Obtain, via the network, the character strings typed on the PC's keyboard.

エ.zh: 通过网络发送对 PC 的操作指令，非法操控该 PC。
エ.en: Send operation commands to the PC via the network to illegitimately control it.

stem.zh:
下列关于通配符的描述中，填入 a、b 处字句的恰当组合是哪一个？
考虑使用表示任意一个字符的「?」和表示长度为零以上的任意字符串的「*」进行字符串检索。在 [ a ] 中，所有包含「データ」（数据）的字符串都符合条件。另外，在 [ b ] 中，所有以「データ」（数据）结尾的字符串都符合条件。
stem.en:
In the following description about wildcards, which combination of expressions to fill in blanks a and b is appropriate?
Consider string searches that use the「?」symbol representing any single character and the「*」symbol representing any string of length zero or more. With [ a ], all strings containing「データ」(data) match. Also, with [ b ], all strings ending with「データ」(data) match.

ア.zh: [表] a: ?数据*　b: ?数据
ア.en: [table] a: ?data*　b: ?data

イ.zh: a: ?データ*　b: *データ
イ.en: a: ?データ*　b: *データ

ウ.zh: [表] a: *数据*　b: ?数据
ウ.en: [table] a: *data*　b: ?data

エ.zh: a: *データ*　b: *データ
エ.en: a: *データ*　b: *データ

2019r01a-q099.stem_jp_clean:
ワイルドカードに関する次の記述中の a，b に入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。
任意の1文字を表す「?」と，長さゼロ以上の任意の文字列を表す「*」を使った文字列の検索について考える。[ a ] では，「データ」を含む全ての文字列が該当する。また，[ b ] では，「データ」で終わる全ての文字列が該当する。

stem.zh: 若干企业中安装了大量存在漏洞的 IoT 设备。其中一台设备感染了恶意软件，并将恶意软件感染扩散到其他大量 IoT 设备。某天的某一时刻，大量感染了恶意软件的 IoT 设备同时向某个特定的 Web 网站发起大量访问，使该 Web 网站的服务陷入停止。该 Web 网站遭受的是哪种攻击？
stem.en: A number of vulnerable IoT devices had been installed in several companies. One of these devices became infected with malware, and the malware infection spread to many other IoT devices. At a certain time on a certain day, the large number of malware-infected IoT devices simultaneously sent a massive volume of accesses to a specific website, forcing the website's service to shut down. Which attack did this website suffer?

ア.zh: DDoS 攻击
ア.en: DDoS attack

イ.zh: 跨站脚本
イ.en: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)

ウ.zh: 字典攻击
ウ.en: Dictionary attack

エ.zh: 社会工程学
エ.en: Social engineering
